items.title: Solana’s 'Alpenglow' upgrade could arrive next quarter, co-founder Yakovenko says
items.summary: Speaking at Consensus Miami 2026, the Solana co-founder said that he is excited to see 'Alpenglow' upgrade go live later this year, which could come as early as next quarter.

items.title: Citi exec says fragmented crypto systems risk repeating old banking problems
items.summary: Tokenized money efforts face limits as corporate clients demand real-time payments that work seamlessly across banks, Citi’s Ryan Rugg said at Consensus in Miami.

items.title: Bitcoin extends gains to $81,500 as tokenization push lifts Bullish, Galaxy, Centrifuge
items.summary: Crypto market momentum could extend further unless geopolitical risks flare up again, one analyst said.

items.title: Forward Industries, RockawayX back OnRe to build onchain reinsurance on Solana
items.summary: Investors back a model that moves insurance risk and capital flows onto blockchain rails, as onchain reinsurance looks to attract institutional participation.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs pull in $532M as BTC reclaims $80K amid ‘post-ceasefire recovery’
items.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs pulled in over $532 million on Monday as BTC surged past $80,000 amid improved risk sentiment following the US-Iran ceasefire.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Crypto derivatives have converged with Wall Street. Equity perps could soon prove it.
items.summary: Crypto and traditional finance are converging fast, with perpetual futures emerging as the strongest bridge between the two.

items.title: North Korea terror victims escalate fight to seize $71 million from Aave hack
items.summary: In a 30-page response filed Tuesday, attorneys for victims of three North Korea terrorism cases reframed the April 18 Aave hack as fraud rather than theft — a distinction that could give the attackers legal title to the borrowed crypto.

items.title: XRP above $1.42 as traders watch 2025 breakout pattern that led to 66% rally
items.summary: Price compression near $1.42 comes as analysts point to a repeating bull flag structure and thinning liquidity conditions.

items.title: Bitcoin tops $81,000 as Strategy mulls selling its BTC to fund dividend obligations
items.summary: Strategy executive chairman Michael Saylor signalling a potential bitcoin sale to cover $1.5 billion in annual dividend obligations sent MSTR down 4% after hours and BTC briefly below $81,000.

items.title: Anchorage launches agentic banking as CEO tips ‘trillion-dollar’ opportunity
items.summary: Anchorage’s new product enables AI agents to have compliant access to capital across traditional finance and crypto payment rails.

items.title: Colombian president says Bitcoin mining could transform country's Caribbean coast
items.summary: The Colombian president pointed to the impact Bitcoin mining has had in Paraguay, which is now the fourth-largest Bitcoin mining country by hashrate.

items.title: Kelp DAO to migrate rsETH to Chainlink CCIP as blame game continues
items.summary: Bryan Pellegrino, co-founder and CEO of LayerZero, disputed Kelp DAO’s accusations and said a postmortem by external security firms will be published soon.

items.title: Iggy Azalea faces class lawsuit over MOTHER memecoin
items.summary: A class-action group has accused rapper Iggy Azalea of not following through on delivering utility and business integrations for her memecoin, Mother Iggy.

items.title: Strategy could sell Bitcoin ‘to inoculate the market,’ Michael Saylor says
items.summary: It marks the first time that Saylor’s company has floated the idea of selling Bitcoin, parting ways with his long-held view that Bitcoin shouldn’t be sold.

items.title: Bitcoin holds $81K amid flat derivatives markets: Is rally sustainable?
items.summary: Bitcoin carved a path toward $82,000, but derivatives metrics need another push from bulls to sustain the rally.

items.title: C/C++ checklist challenges, solved
items.summary: We recently added a C/C++ security checklist to the Testing Handbook and challenged readers to spot the bugs in two code samples: a deceptively simple Linux ping program and a Windows driver registry handler. If you found the inet_ntoa global buffer gotcha or the missing RTL_QUER

items.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy signals potential bitcoin sale to fund dividends obligations
items.summary: Michael Saylor proposes using bitcoin sales to support dividends, as Strategy reported a $12.54 billion Q1 loss.

items.title: Trust in crypto remains biggest barrier to adoption, say Consensus Miami 2026 panelists
items.summary: Speakers point to complexity, poor user experience and lack of transparency as key obstacles for mainstream users.

items.title: The world's entire economy will be tokenized, says Consensys’ Joseph Lubin
items.summary: The Consensys CEO and founder said tokenization can be traced back to Ethereum, the blockchain he helped co-found.
